top_signals.title: Early Airbnb, DoorDash backer Y Combinator says Clarity Act could bring crypto to ‘every’ portfolio company
top_signals.summary: Also a backer of companies like Coinbase, OpenAI, Stripe, Reddit, OpenAI and Kalshi, Y Combinator wants to see Congress pass the CLARITY Act.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX 'proxies' plunge as real deal arrives: Here's where traders are buying the dip
top_signals.summary: SpaceX "proxy stocks," whose options volumes were booming ahead of Friday's historic initial public offering, are unwinding gains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: World Cup’s $10 Billion Betting Boom Fuels Market ‘Gamification’
top_signals.summary: The World Cup is expected to be the biggest sporting event on the planet. It may also become the industry’s biggest chance yet to turn a global sporting spectacle into an engine for speculative trading.

top_signals.title: Glencore to resume emissions spending at Quebec smelter
top_signals.summary: Glencore’s announcement marks a reversal from February, when the company suspended nearly $300 million in planned environmental investments.
